title: Automations from progress tracker

posts.author: TomMitchell (Tom Mitchell)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be really good to be able to process automations on the progress bar / tracker to do something like:

If Progress1=100% and Progress2=100% then do an automation.

We have teams that do little bits each then put it all together in a single board so we have progress for each team, but when everyone has completed, it would be good to be able to move that item into a completed section and notify someone about it!
